title: Real gundams, top 3D generator, open-source world models, ChatGPT updates, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: A video news roundup covering recent AI advances including 3D generation (Pixal3D, AsymFlow, Articraft), open-source world models (Sana-WM), small language models (MiniCPM), text-to-speech (DramaBox, Scenema), motion synthesis (PhyMotion, MoCam), and updates to ChatGPT and other AI products. The channel AI Search aggregates and demonstrates emerging AI tools and research projects.
